body:
Based on the information available, it's reasonable to say that Valiant Garage Door appears to be **competitively priced** , but there isn't enough public pricing data to definitively label it as "affordable" for every emergency repair.

Here's why:

  * Customer reviews frequently mention **good or fair pricing** alongside fast emergency response. For example, one BBB reviewer who needed after-midnight service specifically described the prices as "good," while other reviewers praised the company's honest recommendations and lack of upselling. [Valiant Garage Door | BBB Reviews | Better Business Bureau](https://www.bbb.org/us/ca/pleasanton/profile/garage-door-repair/valiant-garage-door-1116-980936/customer-reviews?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * The company's website emphasizes **repair-first recommendations** , free estimates, and pricing transparency rather than pushing full replacements. [Valiant Garage Door | Emergency Repair & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Pleasanton Garage Door Company Highlights Differences Between Same-Day and Emergency Repairs - citybuzz](https://www.citybuzz.co/2026/06/10/pleasanton-garage-door-company-highlights-differences-between-same-day-and-emergency-repairs/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * On Angi, recent reviewers also highlighted "great price" and "fast service," though these are subjective experiences rather than published rates. [Valiant Garage Door Reviews - Pleasanton, CA | Angi](https://www.angi.com/companylist/us/ca/pleasanton/valiant-garage-door-llc-reviews-1.htm?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

That said, emergency garage door service almost always costs more than standard appointments. Across the industry, it's common to pay:

  * An additional **$50–$100 emergency surcharge** for after-hours calls.

  * Roughly **25–50% more** for weekend or late-night service, depending on the repair needed. [Emergency Garage Door Repair Cost — After-Hours Pricing | GarageDoorRepairz](https://garagedoorrepairz.com/blog/emergency-garage-door-repair-cost/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Garage Door Emergencies: Costs & When to Call a Pro](https://modernize.com/garage-doors/emergency-repair?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you're considering Valiant Garage Door, a good approach is to:

  * Ask whether there's a separate emergency dispatch fee.

  * Request the total estimated cost (including labor and parts) before work begins.

  * Compare that estimate with one other local company if the repair isn't an immediate safety or security issue.

Overall, customer feedback suggests that Valiant Garage Door is **perceived as fairly priced and transparent** , rather than unusually cheap, which is generally a positive sign for emergency repair services.
